## <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16'%3E%3Cpath d='M8 0L16 4.618V11.382L8 16L0 11.382V4.618L8 0Z' fill='%2300E0FF'/%3E%3C/svg%3E" width="20" height="20"><img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16'%3E%3Cpath d='M8 0L16 4.618V11.382L8 16L0 11.382V4.618L8 0Z' fill='%2300E0FF'/%3E%3C/svg%3E" width="20" height="20"></picture> The Forensic Reveal

**CHERENKOV** is an AI-powered security scanning framework that autonomously generates, validates, and graduates vulnerability scanners. It operates on a mathematically provable "Trident of Truth": find vulnerabilities, prove them with non-destructive local execution, and cryptographically sign the evidence — without source code, credentials, or customer data ever leaving your hardware.

---

## <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 48 48'%3E%3Cpath d='M24 4L44 14V34L24 44L4 34V14L24 4Z' fill='none' stroke='%2300E0FF' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3C/svg%3E" width="22" height="22"><img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 48 48'%3E%3Cpath d='M24 4L44 14V34L24 44L4 34V14L24 4Z' fill='none' stroke='%2300E0FF' stroke-width='2'/%3E</picture> The Trident Architecture

| Component | Role | Tenet |
|-----------|------|-------|
| **MEISSNER** | The Shield | Fail-closed network perimeter — drops all unauthorized outbound connections |
| **ABLATION** | Sovereignty | Redaction engine — strips PII/credentials before any egress |
| **TOKAMAK** | The Proof | Validation engine — executes live, non-destructive PoC for every HIGH/CRITICAL finding |

Every action is cryptographically signed via SHA-256 WAL/WORM storage, generating **Shred Receipts** for compliance audits.

---

## <picture><source media="(prefers-color-scheme: dark)" srcset="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16'%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='8' r='6' fill='none' stroke='%239D00FF' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='8' r='2' fill='%239D00FF'/%3E%3C/svg%3E" width="20" height="20"><img src="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 16 16'%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='8' r='6' fill='none' stroke='%239D00FF' stroke-width='2'/%3E%3Ccircle cx='8' cy='8' r='2' fill='%239D00FF'/%3E</picture> Core Capabilities

| Capability | Description |
|---|---|
| **Autonomous Scanner Generation** | AI agents create targeted security scanners from CVE feeds & threat intel |
| **5-Gate Validation Pipeline** | Unit (+/-), integration, false-positive, static analysis |
| **Self-Healing Architecture** | Failed scanners automatically diagnosed and repaired |
| **Agentic Red-Teaming** | Multi-agent crews (planner, developer, QA, reviewer) collaborate |
| **CI/CD Native** | GitHub Actions integration with nightly validation & auto-PR graduation |
| **Zero-Egress** | All computation runs locally — no data leaves your hardware |
